title: eleocharis angolensis
intro: Eleocharis angolensis, also known as Angola spike-rush, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae) and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eleocharis angolensis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, wounds, and digestive issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, and can be used topically or taken orally.
